features.name: dshr shift amount from addition result on reg feedback
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift right operation where the shift amount is derived from an addition result that is fed back through a wire to update a register

features.name: signed shift with zero_extended shift amount from single bit wire
features.description: Code should include a signed dynamic shift right operation where the shift amount is constructed by zero-extending a single-bit wire to match the operand width

features.name: counter pattern with addition and single bit feedback
features.description: Code should include a counter implementation where a single-bit register is updated via a wire that computes the next state from addition, creating a modulo-2 counter
